title: justicia olmeca
intro: Justicia olmeca, also known as the Olmec Balm, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. Consuming Justicia olmeca has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical use, and its extracts are also used in various herbal preparations, including ointments and tinctures.
